name: Orilesti Tomb Entrance
description: The icy wind howls against the mountainside. Before you stands an ornate stone door.

name: Antechamber
description: This small room provides refuge from the harsh conditions outside. The walls are carved with scenes from the history of the city of Orilest.

name: Corridor
description: A narrow, claustrophobic corridor. Glowing orbs dimly illuminate the way ahead.

name: Western Alcove
description: A small alcove. Three sarcophogi are lined up against the wall.

name: Eastern Alcove
description: A small alcove. Two sarcophogi sit against either side of the room, with a pile of rubble where the third should be.

name: Corridor
description: The end of the narrow corridor.

name: Storeroom
description: A cramped storeroom, filled with embalming supplies.

name: Grand Hall
description: This large hall is illuminated by sunlight streaming in through gaps in the roof. In the center of the room lies a single ornate sarcophogus.
